## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Mariana Marins' background and potential fit for an executive assistant role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mariana has diverse experience in executive assistance, marketing, translation, and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [growthx.ai values first-principles thinking and automation to build scalable solutions for clients](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [The role requires \~4-5 hour overlap with PT time zone and ability to work asynchronously](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Company is focused on client growth and reducing churn in the near-term, with plans to offer their platform externally in 1-2 years](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

## Topics

### Mariana's Background and Experience

  - [Executive assistant for winery owners, handling schedules, emails, and acting as liaison](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Manages marketing across multiple social media accounts, websites, and ad campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Customer-facing role via email for catering and restaurant inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Public relations work for award-winning restaurant/winery](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Freelance translator and "virtual assistant" for Lithuanian media company](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Created style guide and conducted training to improve translation workflow efficiency by 50%](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Past experience as executive assistant in fashion, translator for dubbing/subtitling, ESL teacher](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### growthx.ai's Approach and Values

  - [Takes first-principles approach to client problems vs. traditional agency model](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Builds scalable, automated solutions that can be reused across clients](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Example: Creating programmatic demos of client APIs/products for content pages](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Values employees who can identify inefficiencies and propose/implement solutions](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Open to adopting new automation tools to improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Company Vision and Growth Plans

  - [Near-term focus (8-10 months): Grow client base, reduce churn through careful client selection](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [1-2 year plan: Operationalize internal tools/platform to offer components as external service](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Aiming to build "best tooling for content workers" to expand revenue streams](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

### Role Expectations and Logistics

  - [4-5 hour overlap with Pacific Time zone preferred](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Majority of work likely to be asynchronous](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Looking for someone who can handle basics but also build processes and think critically](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Desire for EA to help identify tasks that can be delegated/automated](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marilia (presumably HR) to follow up regarding next steps in hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [Consider Mariana's time zone compatibility (4 hours ahead of PT) for potential scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Evaluate Mariana's experience against desired qualities: process improvement, automation mindset, adaptability to rapid change](https://fathom.video/share/xfEq_D8Mm6wxxNnn2f-suqj7a7MzjQA4?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
